name: Pork & Corn Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Golden Corn Soup (10 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Prep Time: 10 minutes. Cook Time: 30 minutes.
1. Combine soup, stuffing, celery, onion, and paprika in a bowl.
2. Pour the stuffing mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
3. Arrange the pork chops on top of the stuffing, pressing them lightly into the stuffing.
4. In a separate bowl, mix brown sugar and mustard until well combined.
5. Spread the sugar and mustard mixture evenly over the pork chops.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes or until the pork chops are no longer pink.
7. Garnish with celery leaves if desired. Serves 4.
